feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud, connectivity
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud, connectivity Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Scope Deployment
entry.content:
How to create a connection from S/4HANA to SAC?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Install SAP Cloud Connector on a Mac M2 Processor
entry.content:
Introduction:
This guide outlines a step-by-step process to install the SAP Cloud Connector on a Mac with an M2 processor, enabling you to connect your local resources to applications on the SAP Business Technology Platform for seamless integration and secure data management.

Step 1: Verify Java Version
The SAP Cloud Connector requires Java versions 1.8, 11, or 17 to function correctly. To check your current Java version, open Terminal and execute:

 

java -version

 


If Java is not installed or not one of the supported versions, install Java 17 using Homebrew by running:

 

 

brew install openjdk@17

 

 


After installation, verify the Java version again to ensure the correct version is installed.

Step 2: Download the SAP Cloud Connector
Navigate to the [SAP Development Tools page](https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#cloud). Select the version of the Cloud Connector suitable for M2 processors, specifically looking for the 'portable' version. Download this version to your computer.

Step 3: Update the `go.sh` Script
Before starting the installation, you need to update the `go.sh` script to ensure it references the correct Java path. Open the `go.sh` file in a text editor and modify the JAVA_HOME variable as follows:

 

JAVA_HOME="/Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/openjdk-17.jdk/Contents/Home"

 

Save the changes to ensure the script uses the correct Java environment.

Step 4: Installation
Unzip the downloaded file and open a Terminal window in the directory where the file was unzipped. Run the go.sh script by executing the following command:

 

./go.sh

 

Follow the on-screen instructions to complete the setup. Once the installation process is finished, your application will be ready and accessible on port 8443.

Important Note: To log in for the first time, use the default username 'Administrator' and the password 'manage'. Remember to change these credentials after your initial login to secure your installation.

Step 5: Configuration
Once installed, launch the SAP Cloud Connector and configure it to connect to your SAP BTP account:
- Open the Cloud Connector UI.
- Log in with your S-user ID and password. Administrator / manage
- Configure your landscape directory and cloud services as required.

Step 6: Testing the Connection
Check that your setup is correctly configured by testing the connection to SAP BTP from the Cloud Connector's UI under 'Status'.

References:
- For detailed installation steps and configurations, please follow the instructions provided on the [SAP help portal](https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/installation?locale=en-US).

Conclusion:
With the Cloud Connector now installed and configured on your Mac M2 processor, you are set to bridge your local systems with the SAP Business Technology Platform, enhancing security and data synchronization across your applications.

entry.title: Is there is a way to bring data from Employee Central Payroll into SAC by SAC provided connection?
entry.content:
Hello SAC experts,

 

I am trying to get the payroll data from Employee Central payroll into SAC model.

Is there a way to get this done using the standard connection provided by SAC?

Connection name: "SAP SuccessFactors"

When I use the above mention connection, I can see the two queries available in SAC, which are:

1. Employee Payroll Run Results

2. Employee Payroll Run Results Items

 

However, when imported, these qieries dont fetch any records.

Please suggest.

 

Best regards,

Umesh Jethwani

entry.title: SAC for office excel stuck on login screen
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to access SAC Excel add-in and its loading & loading when we click on login and ended without logging in. PFA for more info about the issue and version details.

This issue is only affecting a few users. These affected users have the latest MS Excel installed and they have used the Add-in for several months until yesterday afternoon when the issue began.

Most of the other users can login in seconds.

Please let us know if there is any resolution recommendations. We have tried removing excel add-in and add it again.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Connection to BW - Hebrew
entry.content:
Connection to BW - Hebrew

I connect the SAC to the BW system using live connection

When i present the data in a story table all the des is not showing good

What can be the reason

entry.title: Update Member properties of SAC model via API
entry.content:
Dear Members ,

Our business requirement is to send details from SAC to SF , But we want to also update the member status of the data was send successfully to SF .

I am aware about the export API, Could you let me know if this is possible for we can update a member's details via an API from external middleware like SAP CPI?

entry.title: missing SAC optimized story functions
entry.content:
I'm using Optimized Story Experience API Reference Guide to enhance my stories and I encounter lots of missing functions.

for example, I'm missing the export function 

I'm missing all of the functions in this link and more

Optimized Story Experience API Reference Guide Version 2023.8 (sap.com)

entry.title: List of standard content in SAC for Finance/Procurement/EAM/HR on S4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I am new in SAC configuration and need some help regarding few questions

1-List of standard reports in finance/EAM/Procurement/HR where source is S4HANA Cloud

2-List of activities to be performed for start using SAC from Basis/Network/Security team

Thanks in advance,

Shefali

entry.title: What's the major difference between odata and S/4hana Conection in SAP Analytics cloud?
entry.content: I am trying to access a custom CDS view on the S/4HANA public cloud using SAC. I noticed that both OData and S/4HANA connections can be used to access the custom CDS view. Could someone explain the differences between these two methods? Also, which method is generally recommended for accessing custom CDS views?

entry.title: SAC Connection to S4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,I am trying to create connections to S4HANA Cloud Private from SAC.The documentation that I found in SAP Help portal was about creating connection to S4HANA Cloud and does not specify Public or Private

Can we assume that the steps are same irrespective of Public or Private

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/0485d540e0b340a0bc0da86fe368997c.html

entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to open the SAC Dashboard getting as below error,

Please contact your administrator.
Correlation ID: 904423243-3358-4386-8122-510832278304

 

Please support on this.

entry.title: dimension hierarchy for data import from BW model
entry.content:
Hallo,

I have imported data from BW model in SAC however I am unable to set the hierachy like in the query imported. and I am not able to figure out how to do it in SAC model. is there tips in this regard?

entry.title: SAP Trail Datasphere Analytical models are not appearing in Trail SAP Analytics Cloud - Live Connect
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have created SAP trail Datasphere and Trail SAP Analytics Cloud accounts.

Datasphere: In data builder, i have created a table and uploaded the data from CSV file. On top of this table, i have created a new graphical view and enabled Expose for Consumption. Then , i have created new Analytic model as a last step.

SAP Analytics Cloud : In SAC, I created a Live connection to the Datasphere and it was successful. Then, when i try to create a story and consume the analytical model using this live connection, i don't see this model appearing and space is empty.

Can you any help/ or suggest what is the issue?.

Regards,

Manoj

entry.title: SAP SAC have a data streaming functionality
entry.content:
HI 

Does SAP SAC have a data streaming functionality so that any change of the source table (new or change record) that is replicated in SAP DSP is  automatically pops up in SAP SAC report without manual refresh?

Thanks

entry.title: Conect to sap b1 10.00.110 via DI aPI
entry.content:
Dears,

I am using vb.net to connect SAP Business One 10.00.170 via DI API using following code which works perfectly , but when i try to conect to 10.00.110 and facing following error while connecting to DB.

-132 Error during SBO user authentication
public SAPbobsCOM.Company fnGetCompany()
{
oCompany = new Company()
oCompany.Server = "10.10.50.101"
oCompany.DbServerType = BoDataServerTypes.dst_MSSQL2017
oCompany.CompanyDB = "TEST_COMPANY"
oCompany.UserName = "manager";
oCompany.Password = "****";
oCompany.DbUserName = "****";
oCompany.DbPassword = "*****";
oCompany.UseTrusted = true;
oCompany.language = BoSuppLangs.ln_English;
int result = oCompany.Connect();
if (result != 0)
{
MessageBox.Show( oCompany.GetLastErrorCode() + " " + oCompany.GetLastErrorDescription());
}
return oCompany;

}

What could be possible reasons ?

entry.title: Connect Analysis for Office (AfO) with SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
entry.content:
Hi community,

I would like to access my models in SAC with AfO. I created a new connection according to this helpful post: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/connecting-sac-to-ao-analysis-office/ba-p/13456407

It worked, but I can only see the two Models you can see in the Screenshot. That is a customer's tenant, on our tenant I can see all models.

How can I access all the other models in the customer's tenant, that I could access in SAC directly? Any ideas?

 

Thanks in advance,

Eric

entry.title: SAC implementation
entry.content:
Hi,

Once we get the SAC tenant from SAP, what steps to be taken for configuring SAC

We will be going with creating Direct Live connection to S4HANA

Thanks,

entry.title: The job failed due to an unexpected internal server error. Please contact your system admin in SAC
entry.content:
Hi SAP Members,

I have created successful connection with SAP Business ByDesign. I am getting below error in SAC   while trying to create data sets.  The job failed due to an unexpected internal server error. Please contact your system administrator...."  

The sap KBA document has no resolution points is "This issue is currently under investigation by Development." and further updates from them. 

Do anyone have idea how to solve this error? and  I have attached the error also SAP KBA screenshot 

 

Regards

Janarthanan

entry.title: Passing the DIMENSION ID of an Associated Dimension as URL parameter
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to call/open  report using scripting. I used use the onselect event of the table and checked if user selected a particular dimension if he did I called using

 

NavigationUtils.openStory("DD6FC70093DC25R3456655553384E1F5", "a31b2345-f033-4b42-ac46-3eeff8891c8e7a",[UrlParameter.create('mode','view'),UrlParameter.create('f01Model','t.2.Cvlrse0adfdfdafafdtj57v2g:Cvlrse04jrt2cfarc2h4tj57v2g'),UrlParameter.create('f01Dim','CLIENT_CODE1'),UrlParameter.create('f01Val',member),UrlParameter.create('f01Op','in')],true);

It generated all URL similar to below

https://XYZ-q.ap11.hcs.cloud.sap/sap/fpa/ui/tenants/f9907/app.html#/story2&/s2/DD6FC70093DC2595384877B53384E1F5/?f01Op=in&f01Val=3YYYYYY1&f01Dim=CLIENT_CODE1&f01Model=t.2.Cvlxysxxrt2cfarc2h4tj57v2g:Cvlrseabscfarc2h4tj57v2g&url_api=true&page=a31b3cd2-f023-4b22-ac46-3e90b81c8e7a&mode=view&view_id=story2 

This gave me an error

We detected problems in the URL used to access this story. If you came to this story from a URL you assembled yourself, please resolve the errors below. If you were brought here from a link, please contact your administrator. There was an invalid dimension ID for filter f01. Please check that the parameters and values passed to the URL API are well-formed and properly encoded. For more help with the usage of the API, refer to the documentation at: https://help.sap.com/viewer/a4406994704e4af5a8559a640b496468/release/en-US/0c84d524ee1c4b88836287579cae7923.html

 

In model I have the CLIENT_CODE is used twice through two associations CLIENT and PARENT CLIENT

CLIENT_CODE1 and CLIENT_CODE are the respective Technical names of the Fields. But I am unable to filter on both. But I use another which is directly available in Fact Table like SALES_DATE i able to pass it as parameter..

Is there a different way to reference Dimensions of an association. Please help me as how to find the exact reference to the dimension from the association.

 

Thanks lot for your help folks.

Regards

Ram

entry.title: How can i combine data in *new data model*ling approach in SAC? Sap analytics cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

in classic modelling approach in SAC which will be phased out sooner or later and there we wont use it anymore - you could glue your tables together using some dimensions (join, link, combine - call it what you want). I don't see a similar option in the "new data model" approach, if it's about 2 tables containing "facts", not talking about master data (aka dimension tables approach). 

Can pls someone help me? I come from QlikSense, where life is easy but not low-code/no-code. I'd like to give the low level SAC approach to a broad audience in our company, so that we get rid of now-excel processes.

Second Question: If i create a dimension table based on an XLS file on a file server, how can i update that dimension table? 

Thanks
